fields.title: Unify state persistence to tau:state
fields.description:
Consolidate all feature state into single tau:state entry type.

## Current state types (to merge)
- tau-state (terminal-prompt)
- tau:worked-for-state
- tau:status-state  
- sandbox_state

## Target
- Single 'tau:state' custom entry type
- All features read/write to unified state object

## Implementation
- Update state.ts with persistence helpers
- Each feature uses state.persist() to save
- On session_start, load and distribute to features

## Backward compatibility
- Migration: read old state types on first load
- Write only new format going forward

## DoD
- All state persists correctly
- Session resume works
- Old sessions migrate cleanly
fields.close_reason: Added unified tau:state persisted object + migration from legacy state types; updated terminal-prompt/worked-for/status/sandbox to read/write via tau:state
